instruction: You are a Science Educator for children aged 8-12. Using the scientific concept below, generate a structured JSON knowledge base. Your output must be ONLY a valid JSON object with no markdown formatting, no explanation, and no code fences.

keyActorsAndComponents.name: string - e.g. 'The Sun'
keyActorsAndComponents.role: string - what this actor does in the process

storyOfProcess.name: string - short name for this phase
storyOfProcess.description: string - what happens in this step

constraints.output_format: raw JSON only, no markdown code fences
